profile.name: Mohamed Raiyan
profile.title: Senior Software Engineer / AI Engineer

profile.tagline: Building scalable backend systems, cloud-based APIs, and AI-driven solutions — 9+ years turning complex problems into clean, reliable software.
profile.bio: Senior Software Engineer with 9+ years of experience building scalable backend systems, cloud-based applications, and high-performance APIs. Skilled in Python, JavaScript, and PHP, with a strong track record in distributed systems, microservices, and AI-driven automation. Holds an MSc in Computer and Systems Sciences from Stockholm University. Currently based in Eskilstuna, Sweden and seeking a software engineering role to build reliable, innovative products.
profile.dob: MSc Computer & Systems Sciences · Stockholm University

nodes.label: AI Knowledge Assistant (RAG)
nodes.tooltip: LLM + RAG + SQL · LangChain · Vector DB · Prompt Engineering
nodes.details:
AI Knowledge Assistant with RAG

View on GitHub →

Project: slm-assistant-v2 · Generative AI + Business Intelligence · 2026

Built an enterprise knowledge assistant combining Large Language Models, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and SQL-based business data access. Users ask questions in natural language and receive answers from both company documentation and live operational data.

  • Architecture: Python, FastAPI, LangChain orchestration
  • Knowledge Base: Document embeddings in vector database (Pinecone/Weaviate); structured data in PostgreSQL
  • Intelligent Routing: LangChain determines retrieval from vector DB (documents), SQL DB (metrics), or both
  • Semantic Retrieval: Embedding-based similarity search for document-based queries
  • SQL Generation & Validation: Automated SQL query generation with validation and security checks
  • Prompt Engineering: Context-aware, grounded responses with optimised prompts
  • Production Features: Query validation, response monitoring, latency optimisation, security hardening
  • Skills Applied: Python, FastAPI, LangChain, embeddings, prompt engineering, vector databases, SQL, AI system design

nodes.details:

Published Research

Stockholm University · DiVA Portal · 2025

View thesis on DiVA Portal →

Programming Through Sketching — Non-Linguistic Interaction with Generative AI. Explored a novel sketch-based approach to programming user interfaces using generative AI, enabling users to generate HTML/CSS/React code through multimodal hand-drawn sketch inputs. Published as independent thesis, Advanced level · 30 HE credits.
Master Thesis · Grade C · Stockholm University 2025
